channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How to find common ground when one partner wants kids and the other does not
item.description: Psychotherapist Merle Bombardieri has helped couples with this dilemma for decades. She shares four exercises to bring clarity.

item.title: Trump blocks legislation over voting bill; here is what it contains
item.description: President Trump derailed a potential party win to push lawmakers to pass an elections overhaul bill that has been a priority.

item.title: Four unexpected facts about abortion in the U.S. after Dobbs
item.description: A complex mix of state laws emerged quickly after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade on June 24, 2022. Here is an update.

item.title: Immigrants fear rising xenophobic violence in South Africa
item.description: Foreign-owned businesses have been attacked, migrants forced from homes, and several people killed. A prominent xenophobic group has threatened all undocumented...
